scripts.deps:policy: node -e "const p=require('./package.json');const bad=[];for(const sec of ['dependencies','devDependencies','optionalDependencies']){for(const [n,v] of Object.entries(p[sec]||{})){if(v==='latest'||v==='*'){bad.push(sec+':'+n+'@'+v)}}} if(bad.length){console.error('Blocked dependency specs:\\n'+bad.join('\\n'));process.exit(1)} console.log('deps policy ok')"
